name: Research Quality Pattern Cluster
hypothesis: Research activity metrics (paper relevance scoring, download success, thematic analysis) produce meaningful gradients for research direction optimization
description: Captures research quality metrics (arXiv paper relevance scoring, download success rate, thematic analysis quality) to create a research cluster in GRAO. This cluster distinguishes between high-quality research output and degraded research, producing gradients that steer toward research improvement when needed.
lessons_learned: Research activity traces produce meaningful quality patterns
Paper relevance scoring creates distinct cluster from system maintenance experiences
Thematic analysis success metrics produce research direction gradients

customization.how_to_add:
To add your own research quality cluster:
1. Track arXiv/HuggingFace paper relevance scoring
2. Record paper download success rates
3. Track thematic analysis quality (cross-day analysis, pattern detection)
4. Record research output metrics (papers downloaded, recommendations, top picks)
5. Add to GRAO experience store with this schema
6. Track research degradation patterns to produce improvement gradients
customization.generic_pattern: Each research activity produces a trace with relevance_score, download_success, quality metrics. These traces cluster together in GRAO as 'research quality' patterns, distinct from 'external API health' patterns.
